emails.subject: Update to Termination Reconciliation
emails.body: Update to Termination Reconciliation I have not recompared the Master Log to the 'Physical Terminated' spreadsheet. This is just an update of my initial review. Any comments would be appreciated. I have also not included the Auto Terminations that we found out about today. After tomorrow's updates, I will do these. We are planning on moving the auto-terminations identified by David and confirmed by Kimberly to the bankruptcy book tomorrow. If anyone has a problem with the counterparties identified, please let me know as soon as possible Thanks, Stacey

emails.subject: RE: Update to Termination Reconciliation
emails.body: RE: Update to Termination Reconciliation Stacey, Harlan Murphy informed me that City of Redding has not terminated. I asked him to have Stephanie Panus take it off of the master list as a "Y". I called Steve Hall and Steve had Harlan call me with the answer to City of Redding. Let me know if you need me to help with anything else. Thanks, Melissa
